compiled_state.title: As a developer, debug-everything and end-session handle @playwright/cli lifecycle
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## Description

**What**: Update debug-everything's Playwright dispatch references and end-session's cleanup and state management to use @playwright/cli patterns. Update cleanup-claude-session.sh to handle .playwright-cli/ directory and orphaned CLI browser processes instead of .playwright-mcp/ state.
**Why**: These two skills have lighter Playwright involvement (orchestration and cleanup) but must be updated to reference the CLI patterns and handle the new state directory.
**Scope**:
- IN: debug-everything/SKILL.md Playwright dispatch references; end-session/SKILL.md cleanup and state references; cleanup-claude-session.sh Step 13 (.playwright-mcp/ → .playwright-cli/); orphaned process cleanup; stale session detection
- OUT: Changes to debug-everything's non-browser bug investigation flow; changes to end-session's non-Playwright session close steps

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, debug-everything and end-session reference @playwright/cli patterns with no remaining .playwright-mcp/ or MCP tool references
  ← Satisfies: "All 5 skills use @playwright/cli commands via Bash"
- When this story is complete, cleanup-claude-session.sh removes .playwright-cli/ session directories and terminates orphaned CLI browser processes
  ← Satisfies: "Session cleanup handles @playwright/cli state instead of .playwright-mcp/ directory"
- When this story is complete, unit tests are written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] Orphaned .playwright-cli/ dirs accumulate on sub-agent kill — pre-flight should clear stale sessions
- [Reliability] Process cleanup must handle both normal exit and timeout-killed scenarios

comments.body: Consideration: [Scope Gap] design-wireframe/SKILL.md line 45 uses 'npx playwright --version' as availability check. This is not in the epic's 5-skill scope. Either update it to use CLI binary check in this story, or document the exclusion rationale.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Story complete: all tasks closed, CLI migration verified
comments.author: Test
